description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for [2 sec->5 sec].

Engraves a Mark on all enemies for [15 sec->30 sec] and deals ??? M.DMG over time. Enemies engraved with Mark takes [10%->25%] more M.DMG. This effect increases by [50%->20%] upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 times and is irremovable.

Deals M.DMG to all enemies every sec for [14 sec->15 sec], heals own HP equal to [75%->100%] of DMG dealt, and inflicts Stun on the hit target for 1 sec with a 10% chance. For the duration of Skill, gains immunity to CC. Against Marked targets, deals increased ??? M.DMG.

Increases M.DEF of all allies. Upon taking fatal DMG, enters a coffin for 5 sec and heals HP equal to proportional to ATK + [10%->6%] of Max HP. While inside the coffin, Jane is not affected by ATK Spd effects, ignores All DMG, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every sec.

light.unified: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

dark.unified: In exchange for [1 additional Mana Cost->1 additional Mana Cost], the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.unified: Duration is reduced to 10 sec and DMG is boosted by [500%->250%].

dark.unified: Upon use, dispels negative effects of all allies.
Upon activation, stun all enemies for [1 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] For 10 sec, reduces the target's CC Resist by [320->250] and M.Block by {0}.
[Mark of Death] Increases ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec when the marked enemy dies. This effect stacks up to [16->8] times.
[Day of Ruin] DMG is increased by {0}% and with every DMG dealt, target's M.DEF is reduced by [3%->5%] for 5 sec. This effect can stack a max 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from all allies and reduces All DMG dealt on self by {0}% for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Each hit of Jane's attacks increase her ATK and Recovery Rate by 1% each. (Maximum stack number is [35->50])

description.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by {1}% every sec. Additionally, increases DMG dealt against Non-Hero enemies of the ally with the highest ATK excluding self by {2}%. The DMG Boost effect is irremovable. When the Passive Skill is activated, recovers 30% of Mana.
